commands.review_summary:
The branch adds `origin`, `active`, and `deliveryContext` route metadata to `session_status`, wires active route context through `createOpenClawTools`, and adds regression tests plus session-tool documentation.

PR surface: Source +171, Tests +153, Docs +13. Total +337 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main lacks origin, active, and delivery route metadata in `session_status`, while the linked report gives concrete Discord-origin then webchat-active steps. I did not run a live cross-surface handoff in this read-only review.
